summary: Updated the homepage submissions navigation and section copy to use Call for Papers language with concise 4 to 6 page paper guidance, while preserving the existing single-page anchor structure.
work_completed: Renamed the homepage navigation label from Submissions to Call for Papers.
Updated the submissions section heading to Call for Papers without changing the section anchor id.
Replaced placeholder submissions text with concise workshop-aligned guidance describing 4 to 6 page paper submissions and keeping logistics generic.

findings.message: No automated tests were added or run because this task only changed static homepage copy in index.html.
Repository docs still describe the homepage as having a placeholder submissions section; documentation should be reconciled separately if the docs harness must reflect current site behavior.

follow_up_recommendations: Update docs/product-specs/workshop-website.md in a separate scoped task so the docs harness matches the new homepage Call for Papers content.
